info.title: hum
info.description: CLI tool that eliminates friction between app ideas and running infrastructure - from repository creation to deployment in under 60 seconds

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: hum - A CLI tool for provisioning and managing web applications

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create and deploy a new service with full deployment pipeline

arguments.name: name
arguments.description: The name of the service to create

commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize a new project with default configuration

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save a project configuration as a template

commands.name: use
commands.description: Use a template to create a new project

commands.name: inventory
commands.description: List the current inventory and validate / explore Ansible configuration

commands.name: ansible-config
commands.description: Interactively configure and validate Ansible orchestrator settings

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Deploy app configuration to remote Ansible vars folder

arguments.name: app-name
arguments.description: Name of the app to deploy
